title: feat: add media handlers for tables, LaTeX, and code blocks in Discord messages
author: YoannDev90

gist.headline: Polly learns to typeset
gist.blurb: Polly just got a massive formatting upgrade. Thanks to YoannDev90, our Discord bot now beautifully renders Markdown tables, LaTeX math equations, and code blocks, saving your eyes from raw syntax.
gist.summary: Added media handlers to the Polly Discord bot to support native rendering of Markdown tables, LaTeX equations, and code blocks.
gist.impact: Discord users will now see beautifully formatted tables, complex math, and clean code snippets instead of raw markdown text when interacting with the bot.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a teacher or typesetter. She is wearing tiny reading glasses and pointing at a retro monitor or chalkboard that displays a neat grid (table), math symbols, and code brackets. The Monitor Robot is watching happily, its screen glowing with formatted text.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pointing at a retro computer monitor. The monitor screen glows lime green (#ecf874) and displays a neat grid table and math symbols. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT head watches happily. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, pointing at a retro computer monitor. The monitor screen glows lime green (#ecf874) and displays a neat grid table and math symbols. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT head watches happily. Soft pastel gradient background.
